news.title: Salesforce tops Q4 earnings estimates: 2 key takeaways
news.summary: Salesforce (CRM) reported fourth quarter earnings results on Wednesday after the closing bell. Adjusted earnings per share (EPS) beat Wall Street's expectations, coming in at $3.81 (compared to analyst estimates of $3.05), while revenue only narrowly beat expectations at $11.2 billion (compared to analyst estimates of $11.17 billion). Salesforce's first quarter revenue outlook also modestly beat expectations. Yahoo Finance Tech Editor Dan Howley takes a closer look at the numbers with Market Domination Overtime host Josh Lipton, highlighting two key details investors should be paying attention to. Meanwhile, Moor Insights & Strategy founder, CEO, and chief analyst Patrick Moorhead comes on the show to explain why he thinks recent disruption in the software sector (IGV) might be overblown. To watch more expert insights and analysis on the latest market action, check out more Market Domination Overtime.

news.title: Salesforce’s (NYSE:CRM) Q4 CY2025 Earnings Results: Revenue In Line With Expectations, Growth To Accelerate Next Year
news.summary: CRM software giant Salesforce (NYSE:CRM) met Wall Street’s revenue expectations in Q4 CY2025, with sales up 12.1% year on year to $11.2 billion. The company’s outlook for the full year was close to analysts’ estimates with revenue guided to $46 billion at the midpoint. Its non-GAAP profit of $3.81 per share was 24.9% above analysts’ consensus estimates.

news.title: Salesforce Stock Slides As Soft Revenue Guidance Adds To AI Concerns

news.title: Salesforce tops Q4 estimates but softer revenue guidance pressures shares
news.summary: Salesforce Inc (NYSE:CRM, XETRA:FOO) shares fell more than 4% afterhours on Wednesday as the cloud software company reported better-than-expected quarterly results but issued a fiscal 2027 outlook that came in slightly below Wall Street expectations on revenue. news.title: Salesforce Sees FY2030 Sales $63.000B
news.summary: Salesforce (NYSE:CRM) sees FY2030 sales of $63.000 billion.

news.title: Salesforce Stock Drops Despite Earnings Beat. Agentforce Demand Rises.
news.summary: Salesforce  stock dropped Wednesday night even after the software company reported better-than-expected fourth-quarter financials.  The cloud pioneer reported fourth-quarter adjusted earnings of $3.81 a share on revenue of $11.2 billion.  Analysts surveyed by FactSet were expecting adjusted earnings of $3.05 a share on revenue of $11.19 billion.

news.title: Salesforce Sees Stable Growth Despite Wall Street’s AI Concerns
news.summary: Salesforce  expects revenue to grow in the current fiscal year at about the same rate as it did the year before, as investors worry about AI’s threat to software.  Salesforce also authorized a $50 billion share buyback program, replacing all previously unused authorizations.  Salesforce is among many companies that investors have focused on in recent weeks amid concerns that artificial-intelligence models will eventually replace software companies.

news.title: Salesforce: Fiscal Q4 Earnings Snapshot
news.summary: The San Francisco-based company said it had profit of $2.07 per share. Earnings, adjusted for one-time gains and costs, came to $3.81 per share. The results beat Wall Street expectations.

news.title: Salesforce Stock Falls Amid Weaker-Than-Expected Fiscal 2027 Revenue Outlook
news.summary: Salesforce stock fell amid Q4 earnings that topped estimates while the software maker's fiscal 2027 revenue guidance came in below views.
